name: qr-cli
description: Node.js CLI that generates styled QR codes via qr-code-styling and returns a JSON envelope containing a base64-encoded PNG/WEBP/JPG or SVG. Accepts options as --key=value flags or a single --json='{...}' blob. Designed to run inside Docker as a sidecar called by other services. See EXAMPLES.md and the Makefile for more info.
